Description: Swamp Stone tier line — custom WCIDs 850348-850351. Clones from 3694; MirrorEmoteFromWcid 3694. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-4.

Weenies.Notes: Regular tier (custom). Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' top-right black (100690976).

PropertiesString.Name: Swamp Stone
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these stones to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Quality tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' top-right black (100690977).

PropertiesString.Name: Swamp Stone (Quality)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these stones to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Pristine tier. Magical (1) glow. Overlay '3' top-right black (100690978).

PropertiesString.Name: Swamp Stone (Pristine)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these stones to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

PropertiesString.Name: Swamp Stone (Perfect)
